text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. Looking forward to working with you!
Welcome to the community, guide_sam! You've been approved as an event helper. Excited to have you on board!
Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! You've been approved as a member. Feel free to explore and ask questions!
Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. We're thrilled to have your expertise here!
